title: Mildly Smoky Filipino Pork Chops Kaldereta
description: A fresh and chewy Filipino dish featuring char-grilled pork chops in a light and savory kaldereta sauce, kosher-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat and season pork chops with salt and black pepper.
Grill pork chops for 5 minutes per side, or until slightly charred and cooked through.
In a large pan, heat olive oil over medium heat and saute garlic and onion until softened.
Add tomato sauce, fish sauce, brown sugar, smoked paprika, and grilled pork chops to the pan, stirring to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve pork chops with the kaldereta sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve with steamed rice.
